text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇶 🇺🇸⚡️Explosions hit Kurdish separatist HQ in Erbil, Iraqi Kurdistan — 5 killed, 2 injured, Iraqi sources report. The Iranian Kurdish opposition announces the deaths of Nada Mery and Samira Al-Eyari." 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 ⚡️ The Iranian Kurdish opposition in Erbil announces the deaths of new members in an attack on their camp.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench 的镜像：“🇮🇶 🇺🇸⚡️伊拉克库尔德斯坦埃尔比勒的库尔德分裂主义者总部遭到爆炸袭击——据伊拉克消息来源称，5人死亡，2人受伤。伊朗库尔德反对派宣布 Nada Mery 和 Samira Al-Eyari 死亡。” 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 位于埃尔比勒的伊朗库尔德反对派宣布其营地遭袭，又有成员死亡。

text: 🌟 Footage shows Hezbollah targeting a newly established Israeli artillery position near Bayyada, southern Lebanon, with a drone.
text_zh: 🌟 视频显示真主党使用无人机袭击了黎巴嫩南部拜亚达附近新建立的以色列炮兵阵地。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Lebanese President Joseph Aoun will address the nation at 20:00 Beirut time. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩将于贝鲁特时间 20:00 向全国发表讲话。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 An Israeli drone strike targeted motorbike in Kounine, Bint Jbeil district, Southern Lebanon, a few hours ago. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 几小时前，一架以色列无人机袭击了黎巴嫩南部宾特朱拜勒区的库宁的一辆摩托车。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇶🇦 🇦🇪 Several airlines have resumed their operations at Beirut international airport including Qatar airways, Fly Dubai and Air Arabia with other carriers expected to join. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇶🇦 🇦🇪 多家航空公司已恢复在贝鲁特国际机场的运营，包括卡塔尔航空、迪拜航空和阿拉伯航空，预计其他航空公司也将加入。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 ⚡️ Explosions hit Kurdish separatist HQ in Erbil, Iraqi Kurdistan — 5 killed, 2 injured, Iraqi sources report. The Iranian Kurdish opposition announces the deaths of Nada Mery and Samira Al-Eyari.
text_zh: 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 伊拉克库尔德斯坦埃尔比勒的库尔德分裂主义者总部遭到爆炸袭击——据伊拉克消息来源称，5人死亡，2人受伤。伊朗库尔德反对派宣布 Nada Mery 和 Samira Al-Eyari 死亡。

text: Trump says that once a deal is reached, he might go to Islamabad, but he hasn't made that determination yet. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 特朗普表示，一旦达成协议，他可能会前往伊斯兰堡，但他尚未做出决定。来源：路透社

text: Countless people came back home to get a breath of relief from their own homes and towns Many will leave back soon because of the threats and the ongoing needs to rebuild Please understand that the war is not done. Don't enter houses that aren't yours. Don't report seeing anything and don't touch anything
text_zh: 无数人回到家中，在自己的家园和城镇中松了一口气。由于威胁和持续的重建需求，许多人很快就会再次离开。请理解战争尚未结束。不要进入不属于你的房子。不要报告你看到的任何东西，也不要触碰任何东西。

text: Trump to Reuters: The U.S. will work with Iran to recover its enriched uranium and will bring it back to the U.S. We will go in at a leisurely pace to recover the uranium.
text_zh: 特朗普对路透社表示：美国将与伊朗合作回收其浓缩铀，并将其带回美国。我们将以从容的步伐去回收这些铀。

text: Trump tells Reuters that the U.S. will keep blockade of Strait of Hormuz in place until deal with Iran is finalized.
text_zh: 特朗普告诉路透社，在与伊朗达成协议之前，美国将继续封锁霍尔木兹海峡。

text: Before the ceasefire took effect, the Israeli demolished new towns Carried out massive waves of bombing that killed countless families And only recently a few ago drone striked a motorcycle in south Lebanon. Hezbullah will have to ensure what happened before is not going to happen again
text_zh: 在停火协议生效之前，以色列摧毁了新的城镇，进行了大规模的轰炸，杀害了无数家庭，并且就在不久前，还在黎巴嫩南部用无人机袭击了一辆摩托车。真主党将不得不确保之前发生的事情不会再次发生。

text: 🇮🇷 Iranian Foreign Minister: In accordance with the ceasefire agreement in Lebanon, we announce the full opening of the Strait of Hormuz to all comm ercial vessels for the remainder of the truce period. Damn everyone and anyone who contributed in weakening Lebanon by forging a path separate than the one being guarded by Iran They want to make us a prey for Israel They do not understand that if Iran succeeds in making a deal with Trump, Netanyahu will be handled like an old used toy and forced to withdraw in south Lebanon FULLY
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗外交部长：根据黎巴嫩停火协议，我们宣布在停火期剩余时间内，霍尔木兹海峡对所有商船全面开放。诅咒所有通过开辟与伊朗所守护的道路不同的路径而削弱黎巴嫩的人。他们想让我们成为以色列的猎物。他们不明白，如果伊朗成功与特朗普达成协议，内塔尼亚胡就会像一个旧玩具一样被处理掉，并被迫完全撤出黎巴嫩南部。

text: Let us be very clear The ceasefire that happened in Lebanon is temporary and more dangerous than the war continuing It connects the end of the war to a comprehensive peace deal with Israel and normalization including a demilitarization of south Lebanon where the Lebanese army can be deployed, but only with small arms It paves the way to secure Israeli borders forever This war is painful and so far the Lebanese casualties are too damn high, but any surrender now would be a waste of all that blood and youth lost (in vain) The only reason a ceasefire happened is because of Iran and anyone that tells you otherwise is a liar. The IDF didn't finish clearing Bint Jbeil and they didn't finish some of the towns they need to hold a security zone in south Lebanon. They ignored the Lebanese government for the full period of the war and Mashallah only suddenly agreed to talk following the Iranian American talks. The only difference and I tell you clearly, the U.S and Israel are working on nullifying this Iranian effort by carving a new separate way for Lebanon and detach it from Iran which would put Hezbullah in a dire situation having to handle both the Lebanese state and Israel. They want to separate both paths and if they succeed, this is a major loss for Hezbullah and an ever weaker position by Iran (failure). If they succeed, the situation will be more bleak because Lebanese are not rallying around anti Israeli rhetoric and the Shia cannot carry this burden alone nor fight the other political parties when the Israeli war is ongoing and the Shia population is sheltering in those areas. I hope you guys can understand what I mean. Worse? What the f is this ceasefire when demolishing of houses and towns continue? At least during war we can bomb the towns where Israeli forces are working on. Not let them demolish our homes in peace Do you guys understand what it is to lose a home you spent years and decades saving for? The whole world is complicit in this well documented Jewish crime in south Lebanon and before that in Gaza. Demolition of towns and houses is a grave war crime and an ever graver moral loss. Damn you and damn everyone
text_zh: 让我们把话说清楚：黎巴嫩达成的停火协议是暂时的，而且比战争继续下去更危险。它将战争的结束与以色列的全面和平协议及关系正常化挂钩，包括黎巴嫩南部的非军事化，黎巴嫩军队虽然可以部署在那里，但只能携带轻武器。这为永久保障以色列边境安全铺平了道路。这场战争是痛苦的，到目前为止，黎巴嫩的伤亡人数高得离谱，但现在任何投降都是对所有白白牺牲的鲜血和青春的浪费。停火发生的唯一原因是伊朗，任何告诉你其他原因的人都是骗子。以色列国防军（IDF）还没有完成对宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）的清理，也没有完成他们需要在黎巴嫩南部建立安全区所需的一些城镇的清理工作。他们在整个战争期间无视黎巴嫩政府，直到伊朗和美国进行会谈后，Mashallah才突然同意谈判。唯一的区别是，我明确告诉你，美国和以色列正致力于通过为黎巴嫩开辟一条新的独立道路并将其与伊朗脱钩来抵消伊朗的这种努力，这将使真主党陷入必须同时应对黎巴嫩国家和以色列的困境。他们想把这两条路径分开，如果他们成功了，这对真主党来说是一个重大损失，对伊朗来说是一个更加软弱的立场（失败）。如果他们成功了，局势会更加严峻，因为黎巴嫩人并不支持反以色列的言论，什叶派无法独自承担这一负担，也无法在以色列战争持续且什叶派人口在这些地区避难时去对抗其他政党。我希望你们能明白我的意思。更糟糕的是？当房屋和城镇的拆毁仍在继续时，这算什么狗屁停火？至少在战争期间，我们可以轰炸以色列军队正在作业的城镇。而不是让他们在和平中拆毁我们的家园。你们明白失去一个你花了几年甚至几十年积蓄才买到的家是什么感觉吗？全世界都对黎巴嫩南部以及之前在加沙发生的这一有据可查的犹太罪行负有共犯责任。拆毁城镇和房屋是严重的战争罪，也是更严重的道德沦丧。诅咒你们，诅咒所有人。

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇭 Philippine forces killed ten suspected Muslim militants in the deadliest clash so far this year, including the commander of the Dawlah Islamiya‑Maute group, Amerol Mangoranca. The hour‑long gunbattle took place in Lanao del Sur province. There were no government casualties. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇭 菲律宾军队击毙了十名疑似穆斯林武装分子，这是今年以来最致命的一次冲突，其中包括Dawlah Islamiya‑Maute组织的指挥官Amerol Mangoranca。这场持续一小时的枪战发生在南拉瑙省（Lanao del Sur）。政府军没有伤亡。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Trump tells NewsNation that Iran has agreed to stop enriching uranium, adding that Iran "agreed to everything." - N12 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：特朗普告诉NewsNation，伊朗已同意停止铀浓缩，并补充说伊朗“同意了一切”。 - N12推文

text: Open Source Intel We are so used to this, but this is mind blowing. Hope to get English one soon. The elimination chart of Iran’s regime leadership. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045158658850324521/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：我们对此习以为常，但这令人震惊。希望能尽快看到英文版。伊朗政权领导层的清除图表。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045158658850324521/photo/1 - 开源情报推文

text: WarTranslated An Iranian official told Fars that if the US naval blockade of Iranian ports continues, it will be treated as a ceasefire violation. He said the Strait of Hormuz transit route would be closed. Iran says it has opened the Strait of Hormuz for the duration of the Lebanon ceasefire. The foreign minister wrote that passage for all commercial ships is fully open on the agreed route for the rest of the truce. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045128302210253285/photo/1 - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: 战争翻译（WarTranslated）：一位伊朗官员告诉法尔斯通讯社，如果美国对伊朗港口的封锁继续下去，将被视为违反停火协议。他说霍尔木兹海峡的过境路线将被关闭。伊朗表示，在黎巴嫩停火期间，它已经开放了霍尔木兹海峡。外交部长写道，在停火协议的剩余时间内，所有商船在商定路线上的通行完全开放。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045128302210253285/photo/1 - 战争翻译推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 BREAKING | Benjamin Netanyahu on Lebanon: 📌 “We have achieved significant results — for the first time in history, we have created a long security zone along the entire northern border. This zone removes the immediate threat of infiltration. We have destroyed nearly 90% of the missile stockpiles there. 📌 Hezbollah today is a shadow of its former self. Our mission is not yet complete. This will not be achieved overnight — it requires patience and sustained effort.” 📌 “We agreed to a temporary ceasefire in Lebanon. For the first time in 43 years, Israel and Lebanon are speaking directly. We are giving both diplomatic and military solutions a chance.” 📌 “The path to peace is still long, but we have already begun it. We hold weapons in one hand, and extend the other toward peace.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 快讯 | 本雅明·内塔尼亚胡谈黎巴嫩：📌 “我们取得了重大成果——历史上第一次，我们在整个北部边境沿线建立了一个长期的安全区。该区域消除了渗透的直接威胁。我们摧毁了那里近90%的导弹储备。 📌 真主党今天已不复当年。我们的任务尚未完成。这不会在一夜之间实现——它需要耐心和持续的努力。” 📌 “我们同意在黎巴嫩实行临时停火。43年来，以色列和黎巴嫩首次直接对话。我们正在给外交和军事解决方案一个机会。” 📌 “通往和平的道路依然漫长，但我们已经开始了。我们一手持武器，另一手伸向和平。” 与我们一起查看最新更新： @NSTRIKE1231 推文

text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：游轮“Celestyal Discovery”号似乎刚刚成功通过了霍尔木兹海峡。 - @Osinttechnical https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045162781452689918/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel FARS NEWS: IRAN TO CLOSE STRAIT OF HORMUZ IF U.S NAVEL BLOCKADE CONTINUES tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：法尔斯新闻（FARS NEWS）：如果美国海军封锁继续，伊朗将关闭霍尔木兹海峡 推文

text: Open Source Intel The IDF released a summary of 40 days of operations against Iran, saying all declared objectives were achieved and the regime is at its weakest since its founding. 28 senior commanders were eliminated. Roughly 250 air defense systems were destroyed and 60% of ballistic missile launch platforms taken out of service. Over 4,000 targets were struck, with more than 4,600 airstrikes conducted in Tehran alone. The IDF Chief of Staff designated the Iranian front as the military's primary readiness front, with forces prepared to resume operations if necessary. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：以色列国防军发布了针对伊朗40天行动的总结，称所有既定目标均已实现，该政权处于自成立以来最虚弱的状态。28名高级指挥官被清除。大约250个防空系统被摧毁，60%的弹道导弹发射平台停止服务。超过4000个目标被打击，仅在德黑兰就进行了超过4600次空袭。以色列国防军参谋长将伊朗战线指定为军队的主要战备战线，部队已准备好在必要时恢复行动。推文

text: Open Source Intel PM Netanyahu: “At the request of my friend President Trump, we agreed to a temporary ceasefire in Lebanon. At his request. We have not finished the job. There are plans to deal with the remaining rocket and drone threats. I will not elaborate.” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：内塔尼亚胡总理：“应我的朋友特朗普总统的要求，我们同意在黎巴嫩实行临时停火。应他的要求。我们还没有完成工作。有计划应对剩余的火箭弹和无人机威胁。我不会详述。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Important report from Israeli military reporter @Doron_Kadosh : Ten key headlines from today's IDF senior briefing to military correspondents: IDF warned the political leadership: Iran is arriving to negotiations extremely weak. Do not give in. The military's demands, all enriched uranium must leave Iran, permanent enrichment ban, and no unfreezing of regime funds. If Iran refuses, there is still significant unfinished work — starting with energy infrastructure that wasn't hit. If ballistic missiles aren't addressed in a deal, Iran could rebuild thousands within a few years, potentially forcing another Israeli campaign. Despite the strikes, Iran still has many centrifuges. The most urgent issue is removing enriched uranium. If it stays, Iran can enrich to 90% weapons-grade and move closer to a bomb. IDF assessed from the start that regime collapse was unlikely through airstrikes alone, but says there are now cracks and fractures in the regime. Iran fired approximately 1,400 ballistic missiles during the campaign. Only 39% targeted Israel. The rest hit Gulf states. Interception rate was 84%, lower than previous rounds due to Iran's use of cluster warhead missiles. Over 70% of impacts in Israel were cluster munitions. Damage to Iranian industry estimated at $100 billion. Recovery expected to take years. IDF recommended striking power plants. The political leadership said no. Israel dropped more heavy munitions on Iran than the U.S.: 19,000 vs 17,000. Gaza's yellow line model is being applied to Lebanon. 55 villages within the zone are off-limits to civilians. IDF continues destroying terror infrastructure there during the ceasefire. Hezbollah fired roughly 8,000 rockets and missiles. A third targeted Israel's home front. The rest targeted IDF forces in southern Lebanon. Only 75 hit. Drone interception rate: 92%. IDF supports the Lebanon ceasefire and sees potential for long-term quiet, if forces remain within the yellow line and a U.S.-supervised demilitarization mechanism is established. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：来自以色列军事记者 @Doron_Kadosh 的重要报道：以色列国防军今天向军事记者简报的十个关键标题：以色列国防军警告政治领导层：伊朗在谈判时极其虚弱。不要让步。军方的要求是，所有浓缩铀必须离开伊朗，永久禁止浓缩，且不得解冻政权资金。如果伊朗拒绝，仍有大量未完成的工作——从尚未被打击的能源基础设施开始。如果弹道导弹问题在协议中没有得到解决，伊朗可能会在几年内重建数千枚，这可能迫使以色列进行另一次军事行动。尽管进行了打击，伊朗仍拥有许多离心机。最紧迫的问题是清除浓缩铀。如果它留下来，伊朗可以浓缩到90%的武器级，并更接近制造炸弹。以色列国防军从一开始就评估认为，仅通过空袭不太可能导致政权崩溃，但表示现在政权内部出现了裂痕和断层。伊朗在行动期间发射了大约1400枚弹道导弹。只有39%瞄准了以色列。其余的击中了海湾国家。拦截率为84%，由于伊朗使用了集束弹头导弹，低于之前的几轮。以色列境内70%以上的撞击是集束弹药。对伊朗工业的损失估计为1000亿美元。预计恢复需要数年时间。以色列国防军建议打击发电厂。政治领导层拒绝了。以色列在伊朗投下的重型弹药比美国还多：19000枚对17000枚。加沙的“黄线”模式正在应用于黎巴嫩。该区域内的55个村庄禁止平民进入。以色列国防军在停火期间继续在那里摧毁恐怖基础设施。真主党发射了大约8000枚火箭弹和导弹。三分之一瞄准了以色列的后方。其余的瞄准了黎巴嫩南部的以色列国防军部队。只有75枚击中目标。无人机拦截率：92%。以色列国防军支持黎巴嫩停火，并认为如果部队留在黄线内并建立美国监督的非军事化机制，就有可能实现长期平静。推文

text: OSINTtechnical The US has informed multiple NATO allies, including Lithuania and Estonia, that the delivery of their purchased U.S. military equipment may be delayed due to the war in Iran -Reuters tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical：美国已通知包括立陶宛和爱沙尼亚在内的多个北约盟国，由于伊朗战争，他们购买的美国军事装备的交付可能会延迟 - 路透社推文

text: Open Source Intel As I said, Iran’s version sharply contradicts President Trump. According to reports from the Iranian side, the Strait of Hormuz is not freely open at all. A source tied to Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf says any reopening of the Strait of Hormuz will be tightly restricted under 3 conditions, calling it the outcome Iran has pushed for since the start of the war and is now enforcing on the U.S. 1. Traffic diverted into Iranian territorial waters via Larak Island, described as a fundamental shift cementing Iranian control 2. Passage limited to commercial vessels only, with Iran deciding eligibility, excluding adversary-linked ships and PAYING SECURITY TOLLS 3. All movement must be coordinated by the IRGC Navy, with full Iranian military oversight of the strait Before we get excited about the strait being open, we need to wait. The Islamic regime is known for their games. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：正如我所说，伊朗的版本与特朗普总统的说法截然不同。根据伊朗方面的报道，霍尔木兹海峡根本没有自由开放。一位与穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫（Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf）有关联的消息人士称，霍尔木兹海峡的任何重新开放都将在3个条件下受到严格限制，称这是伊朗自战争开始以来一直推动并现在强加给美国的结果。1. 交通通过拉拉克岛（Larak Island）分流到伊朗领海，这被描述为巩固伊朗控制权的根本性转变。2. 通行仅限于商船，由伊朗决定资格，排除与敌对势力有关的船只并支付安全通行费。3. 所有移动必须由伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）海军协调，并由伊朗军方对海峡进行全面监督。在我们对海峡开放感到兴奋之前，我们需要等待。伊斯兰政权以玩弄手段著称。 - 开源情报推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷 Admin note: The posts above represent the most current operational data released by the Israeli military. You may ask, what does this mean? In the short term, the IDF remains on high alert for a potential resumption of fighting in Iran and Lebanon…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Images showcase multiple IDF infographic on Operation Roaring Lion strikes on more than 1,100 military industry targets across Iran. Eliminated senior figures include IRGC commanders, intelligence officials, and defence leadership – among them IRGC Navy commander Alireza Tangsiri, Quds Force special operations chief Ashghar Bagheri, and Jamshid Eshaqi, commander of the oil headquarters. The graphic indicates that Iran’s ballistic missile production capacity has been reduced from “high” to “low” or “low to medium” across all key stages, including explosives, warhead casting, engine production and final assembly. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷 管理员注：以上帖子代表了以色列军方发布的最新作战数据。你可能会问，这意味着什么？短期内，以色列国防军对伊朗和黎巴嫩可能恢复战斗保持高度警惕……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 图片展示了多张以色列国防军关于“咆哮狮子”（Operation Roaring Lion）行动的图表，该行动打击了伊朗境内1100多个军事工业目标。被清除的高级人物包括伊斯兰革命卫队指挥官、情报官员和国防领导层——其中包括伊斯兰革命卫队海军司令阿里雷扎·坦格西里（Alireza Tangsiri）、圣城旅特种作战负责人阿什加尔·巴盖里（Ashghar Bagheri）和石油总部指挥官贾姆希德·埃沙奇（Jamshid Eshaqi）。图表显示，伊朗的弹道导弹生产能力在所有关键阶段（包括炸药、弹头铸造、发动机生产和最终组装）已从“高”降至“低”或“中低”。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 Iran’s Deputy of Communications and Information of the President's Office: Enemy rhetoric aims to undermine Iranian pride after key victories. Iran’s partial Strait of Hormuz reopening is conditional—any breach will face consequences.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗总统办公室通讯与信息副主任：敌人的言论旨在在关键胜利后破坏伊朗的自豪感。伊朗部分重新开放霍尔木兹海峡是有条件的——任何违规行为都将面临后果。

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Trump says Iran committed “to never close the Strait of Hormuz again” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 特朗普称伊朗承诺“永远不再关闭霍尔木兹海峡” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇮🇷 IDF Chief of Staff Eyal Zamir has ordered the IDF to prepare for a campaign against Iran with a target readiness date between June and November 2026. The map of Iran was divided into sectors: western Iran for the IDF alone; Tehran and central Iran…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Admin note: The posts above represent the most current operational data released by the Israeli military. You may ask, what does this mean? In the short term, the IDF remains on high alert for a potential resumption of fighting in Iran and Lebanon, with a new target bank including energy infrastructure approved if U.S.-Iran talks fail. The ceasefire in Lebanon allows ground forces to hold a “yellow line” buffer zone but restricts airstrikes deep into the country. In the long term, the IDF assesses that Iran’s nuclear program can only be rolled back by removing enriched material and destroying underground infrastructure. Despite heavy economic damage (estimated at $100–600 billion), Iran could rebuild its ballistic missile arsenal within a few years if restrictions are not imposed. The survival of Mojtaba Khamenei, though allegedly wounded and in hiding, leaves the Iranian government intact, failing one of the war's main goals of regime change. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇮🇷 以色列国防军总参谋长埃亚尔·扎米尔（Eyal Zamir）已下令以色列国防军为针对伊朗的军事行动做好准备，目标准备日期定于2026年6月至11月之间。伊朗地图被划分为多个区域：伊朗西部由以色列国防军单独负责；德黑兰和伊朗中部……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 管理员注：以上帖子代表了以色列军方发布的最新作战数据。你可能会问，这意味着什么？短期内，以色列国防军对伊朗和黎巴嫩可能恢复战斗保持高度戒备，如果美伊谈判失败，新的目标库将包括能源基础设施。黎巴嫩停火协议允许地面部队维持一条“黄线”缓冲区，但限制了对该国深处的空袭。长期来看，以色列国防军评估认为，只有通过清除浓缩材料和摧毁地下基础设施，才能扭转伊朗的核计划。尽管遭受了严重的经济损失（估计为1000亿至6000亿美元），但如果不对伊朗实施限制，它可能在几年内重建其弹道导弹库。莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊（Mojtaba Khamenei）虽然据称受伤并躲藏起来，但他的幸存使得伊朗政府得以完整保留，这使得战争的主要目标之一——政权更迭——未能实现。 @wfwitness

text: Keir Starmer: Today we announced our joint plan with France and other international partners to protect freedom of navigation.
text_zh: 基尔·斯塔默：今天我们宣布了与法国及其他国际伙伴的联合计划，以保护航行自由。

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 From Fars News: Officials! At least explain the reason for your “lack of explanation” Simultaneously with the Foreign Minister’s unexpected tweet about the opening of the Strait of Hormuz, followed by Trump’s heated rhetoric, Iranian society has been…" 🇮🇷 The outrage from Iranian media is understandable. There have been no clear statements from Iranian officials since Araghchi’s posts, while Trump has continued posting repeated, extraordinary claims without any visible response or clarification from the Iranian side. As a result, the narrative around the alleged deal and the opening of the Strait of Hormuz has largely been shaped by Trump, with little to no counter-messaging or official explanation from Iran. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 来自法尔斯通讯社：官员们！至少解释一下你们‘缺乏解释’的原因。在外交部长就霍尔木兹海峡开放发表意外推文，随后特朗普发表激烈言论的同时，伊朗社会一直……” 🇮🇷 伊朗媒体的愤怒是可以理解的。自阿拉格齐（Araghchi）发帖以来，伊朗官员没有发表任何明确声明，而特朗普继续发布重复的、非同寻常的声明，伊朗方面没有任何可见的回应或澄清。因此，围绕所谓协议和霍尔木兹海峡开放的叙事在很大程度上是由特朗普塑造的，伊朗几乎没有反驳信息或官方解释。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 From Tasnim News: Criticism of an incomplete and misleading tweet by Araghchi regarding the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz Seyed Abbas Araghchi, Iran’s Foreign Minister, tweeted a short time ago that following the ceasefire in Lebanon, the Strait of…" 🇮🇷 From Fars News: Officials! At least explain the reason for your “lack of explanation” Simultaneously with the Foreign Minister’s unexpected tweet about the opening of the Strait of Hormuz, followed by Trump’s heated rhetoric, Iranian society has been plunged into confusion. International analysts interpret the recent behavior of the U.S. president as a sign of frustration in dealing with Iran’s complex situation. However, what has caused even greater concern among people inside the country is the absolute and unusual silence of the Supreme National Security Council and the negotiating team. Citizens emphasize that they trust officials to observe the system’s red lines and exercise proper judgment, but they expect at least a clear explanation for the “reason for silence.” Public opinion raises the question: if it is in the country’s interest not to disclose details of negotiations or recent developments, why is the reason for this lack of transparency not itself explained to the public? People understand that revealing Iran’s goals and plans would also inform its adversaries, and they do not expect disclosure of sensitive secrets in such circumstances. However, they ask officials not to allow the enemy’s narrative and hostile media to fill the information vacuum and manipulate public sentiment. In these days, Twitter and short statements are not suitable tools for convincing domestic public opinion; even this “lack of explanation” itself requires explanation. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 来自塔斯尼姆通讯社：对阿拉格齐关于重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的不完整且具有误导性的推文的批评。伊朗外交部长赛义德·阿巴斯·阿拉格齐不久前发推文称，在黎巴嫩停火后，海峡……” 🇮🇷 来自法尔斯通讯社：官员们！至少解释一下你们“缺乏解释”的原因。在外交部长就霍尔木兹海峡开放发表意外推文，随后特朗普发表激烈言论的同时，伊朗社会陷入了困惑。国际分析人士将美国总统近期的行为解读为在处理伊朗复杂局势时感到沮丧的迹象。然而，引起国内民众更大担忧的是最高国家安全委员会和谈判团队绝对且不同寻常的沉默。公民们强调，他们相信官员会遵守系统的红线并做出正确的判断，但他们至少期待对“沉默的原因”有一个明确的解释。公众提出了一个问题：如果为了国家利益不披露谈判细节或近期进展，为什么不向公众解释这种缺乏透明度的原因本身？人们理解，揭露伊朗的目标和计划也会让对手知晓，在这种情况下，他们并不期望披露敏感秘密。然而，他们要求官员不要让敌人的叙事和敌对媒体填补信息真空并操纵公众情绪。在这些日子里，推特和简短的声明不是说服国内公众舆论的合适工具；即使是这种“缺乏解释”本身也需要解释。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 From Tasnim News: Criticism of an incomplete and misleading tweet by Araghchi regarding the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz Seyed Abbas Araghchi, Iran’s Foreign Minister, tweeted a short time ago that following the ceasefire in Lebanon, the Strait of Hormuz would be fully open for commercial shipping for the remainder of the ceasefire period. The tweet, which was published without sufficient explanation, created various ambiguities regarding the conditions, details, and mechanisms of passage, and drew significant criticism. At the same time, there are several conditions attached to this issue, one of the most important being the full monitoring of ship traffic by Iran’s armed forces. The passage would also be considered void if the alleged maritime blockade continues. The publication of this tweet, without any accompanying verbal explanation or at least sufficient written clarification, is considered a complete failure in communication. It is evident that either the Foreign Ministry must revise its approach to such announcements, or the Supreme National Security Council Secretariat must fulfill its duty by providing proper information management and establishing a more coordinated framework for public communication by institutions, including the Foreign Ministry. Tweets published by officials, even if written in English, are not seen only by foreign officials. The Iranian public also closely follows these developments as part of its revolutionary duty. Any creation of concern or disappointment among the nation is considered a form of political wrongdoing and a disruption of national unity. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 来自塔斯尼姆通讯社：对阿拉格齐关于重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的不完整且具有误导性的推文的批评。伊朗外交部长赛义德·阿巴斯·阿拉格齐不久前发推文称，在黎巴嫩停火后，霍尔木兹海峡将在停火期间的剩余时间内完全开放供商业航运。这条推文在没有充分解释的情况下发布，在通行的条件、细节和机制方面造成了各种歧义，并引起了广泛批评。同时，这个问题还附带了几个条件，其中最重要的一点是伊朗武装部队对船舶交通的全面监控。如果所谓的海上封锁继续存在，该通行权也将被视为无效。在没有任何口头解释或至少足够的书面澄清的情况下发布这条推文，被认为是沟通上的彻底失败。显而易见，要么外交部必须修改其处理此类公告的方式，要么最高国家安全委员会秘书处必须履行其职责，提供适当的信息管理，并为包括外交部在内的机构建立一个更协调的公共沟通框架。官员发布的推文，即使是用英语写的，也不仅仅是给外国官员看的。伊朗公众也作为其革命职责的一部分密切关注这些事态发展。在国民中制造任何担忧或失望都被视为一种政治错误，是对国家团结的破坏。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: The Failing New York Times, FAKE NEWS CNN, and others, just don’t know what to do. They are desperately looking for a reason to criticize President Donald J. Trump on the Iran situation, but just can’t find it. Why don’t they just say, at the right time, JOB WELL DONE, MR. PRESIDENT, and start to gain back their credibility???
text_zh: 特朗普：失败的《纽约时报》、假新闻CNN和其他媒体，就是不知道该怎么办。他们拼命寻找理由在伊朗问题上批评唐纳德·J·特朗普总统，但就是找不到。他们为什么不在适当的时候说一句“干得好，总统先生”，并开始挽回他们的信誉呢？？？

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷 Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says passage for all commercial vessels through the Strait of Hormuz is “completely open” for the remaining period of the ceasefire. He states vessels are to use the coordinated route already announced by Iran’s…" ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇫🇷 🇮🇷 British Prime Minister Starmer welcomed the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz to commercial vessels. He added that today Britain and France have announced their joint plan to ensure freedom of navigation in the Strait alongside international partners. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐表示，所有商船通过霍尔木兹海峡的通道在停火期间的剩余时间内是‘完全开放’的。他表示，船只应使用伊朗已经宣布的协调路线……” ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇫🇷 🇮🇷 英国首相斯塔默对霍尔木兹海峡重新向商船开放表示欢迎。他补充说，今天英国和法国宣布了他们与国际伙伴一起确保海峡航行自由的联合计划。 @wfwitness

text: Trump said Iran has agreed to stop enriching uranium, calling it a major step in ongoing negotiations. Asked directly, he replied, “Yes… Are you surprised?” and added, “I’m not surprised by anything.” Source: NewsNation
text_zh: 特朗普表示，伊朗已同意停止铀浓缩，称这是正在进行的谈判中的重大一步。当被直接问及时，他回答说：“是的……你感到惊讶吗？”并补充说，“我对任何事情都不感到惊讶。” 来源：NewsNation

text: Brazilian President Lula: We need to strengthen democracy in the world so that we do not allow regression. Because when there is regression, you get a Hitler, you get Nazism, you get fascism.
text_zh: 巴西总统卢拉：我们需要加强世界民主，以免我们允许倒退。因为当出现倒退时，你就会得到一个希特勒，你就会得到纳粹主义，你就会得到法西斯主义。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 The Lebanon ceasefire follows the “yellow line” model from Gaza. Some 55 Lebanese villages are inside the zone; civilians may not return, and the IDF may continue destroying infrastructure during the truce. Hezbollah fired about 8,000 rockets…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 IDF Chief of Staff Eyal Zamir ordered the IDF to prepare for a campaign against Iran with a target readiness date between June and November 2026. The map of Iran was divided into sectors: western Iran for the IDF alone; Tehran and central Iran for joint operations; southern and eastern Iran for the U.S. alone. In the four months before the war, the IDF doubled the number of targets in Iran by six to seven times. The opening strike was originally planned for Saturday night when Iran’s defence council and intelligence ministry leadership were meeting above ground. Mojtaba Khamenei was also a target; the IDF stated he is wounded, hiding, but still communicating and issuing orders – defined as “present‑absent”. During the war, the IDF eliminated approximately 1,000 “repression forces” (Basij and internal security), nine nuclear scientists, and destroyed both of Iran’s satellite launchers. Damage to Iranian industries is estimated at $100 billion, including 40% of steel production, 75% of petrochemicals, and 23% of gas processing. Energy facilities were not hit. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 黎巴嫩停火协议遵循了加沙的‘黄线’模式。约有55个黎巴嫩村庄位于该区域内；平民不得返回，以色列国防军（IDF）在停火期间可继续摧毁基础设施。真主党发射了约8000枚火箭弹……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 以色列国防军总参谋长埃亚尔·扎米尔（Eyal Zamir）下令IDF为针对伊朗的军事行动做准备，目标准备就绪日期定在2026年6月至11月之间。伊朗地图被划分为若干区域：伊朗西部由IDF单独负责；德黑兰和伊朗中部进行联合行动；伊朗南部和东部由美国单独负责。在战争爆发前的四个月里，IDF将伊朗境内的目标数量增加了六到七倍。最初计划在周六晚上发动首次打击，当时伊朗国防委员会和情报部领导层正在地面上开会。莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊（Mojtaba Khamenei）也是目标；IDF称他已受伤，正在躲藏，但仍能进行沟通并发布命令——被定义为“在场但缺席”。战争期间，IDF消灭了约1000名“镇压部队”（巴斯基和内部安全人员）、九名核科学家，并摧毁了伊朗所有的两个卫星发射装置。伊朗工业损失估计为1000亿美元，包括40%的钢铁产量、75%的石化产品和23%的天然气加工能力。能源设施未受打击。 @wfwitness

text: How does it feel to be an account on X with pro-Russian and pro-Iranian views, while the product lead at X—who oversees engagement, Trust & Safety, and essentially the algorithm—is Nikita Bier, who is Jewish, of Ashkenazi heritage, and was raised in a Ukrainian-Jewish family... 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 作为一个在X上持有亲俄和亲伊观点的账号，而X的产品负责人——负责参与度、信任与安全以及算法的核心人物——是尼基塔·比尔（Nikita Bier），他是一位犹太人，拥有阿什肯纳兹血统，并在一个乌克兰犹太家庭中长大，这种感觉如何…… 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Spanish PM Pedro Sánchez: Access to pornographic content among young people — today in Spain, the average age is 11. This is not something minors seek out — these platforms expose them to violent and pornographic content, which objectifies women. Everything we are trying to achieve offline is undermined in what is, today, a kind of failed state: social media.
text_zh: 西班牙首相佩德罗·桑切斯：年轻人获取色情内容的情况——如今在西班牙，平均年龄为11岁。这不是未成年人主动寻求的——这些平台将他们暴露在暴力和色情内容中，这使女性物化。我们在现实生活中努力实现的一切，在如今这个某种意义上的失败国家——社交媒体——中都被破坏了。

text: Iranian official to Fars: If the maritime blockade continues, it will be considered a violation of the ceasefire, and the Strait of Hormuz transit route will be closed.
text_zh: 伊朗官员向法尔斯通讯社表示：如果海上封锁继续，将被视为违反停火协议，霍尔木兹海峡的过境路线将被关闭。

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇺🇸 Donald Trump: 📌 “The Strait of Hormuz is fully open and ready for commercial traffic, but the naval blockade will remain in place specifically against Iran until our deal is 100% finalized. This process should move very quickly, as agreement has already been reached on most issues.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 ：❗️ 🇺🇸 唐纳德·特朗普：📌 “霍尔木兹海峡完全开放并准备好进行商业交通，但针对伊朗的海上封锁将继续实施，直到我们的协议100%最终确定。这一过程应该会非常迅速，因为大多数问题已经达成一致。” 查看我们的最新更新： @NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: "The Failing New York Times, FAKE NEWS CNN, and others, just don’t know what to do. They are desperately looking for a reason to criticize President Donald J. Trump on the Iran situation, but just can’t find it. Why don’t they just say, at the right time, JOB WELL DONE, MR. PRESIDENT, and start to gain back their credibility???" tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普：“失败的《纽约时报》、假新闻CNN和其他媒体，根本不知道该怎么办。他们拼命寻找理由批评唐纳德·J·特朗普总统在伊朗局势上的表现，但就是找不到。他们为什么不在适当的时候说一句，干得好，总统先生，并开始挽回他们的信誉呢？？？” 推文

text: OSINTdefender RT @sentdefender : Pictures published by USA Today show meals served recently to Sailors onboard the Nimitz-class aircraft carrier, USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN-72), as well as Marines serving on the USS Tripoli (LHA-7), an America-class amphibious assault ship, both of which are currently deployed to the Arabian Sea in order to enforce the ongoing naval blockade against coastal areas of Iran. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender RT @sentdefender ：《今日美国》发布的照片显示了最近在尼米兹级航空母舰“亚伯拉罕·林肯”号（CVN-72）上为水手提供的餐食，以及在“的黎波里”号（LHA-7，美国级两栖攻击舰）上服役的海军陆战队员的餐食，这两艘舰船目前都部署在阿拉伯海，以执行针对伊朗沿海地区的持续海上封锁。 推文

text: Open Source Intel IRAN FARS NEWS : An informed source says the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz is tied to specific conditions and the ceasefire in Lebanon. If the U.S. maritime blockade continues, it will be considered a ceasefire violation, and transit through Hormuz will be shut down again. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗法尔斯通讯社：一位知情人士表示，霍尔木兹海峡的重新开放与特定条件及黎巴嫩停火协议挂钩。如果美国的海上封锁继续，将被视为违反停火协议，通过霍尔木兹海峡的过境将再次被关闭。 推文
